ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of the vessel (e.g., ship, boat, submarine) */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vessel */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the vessel */,
  "home_port" TEXT /* Home port of the vessel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the vessel */,
  "imo_number" TEXT /* International Maritime Organization (IMO) number */,
  "mmsi_number" TEXT /* Maritime Mobile Service Identity (MMSI) number */,
  "gross_tonnage" REAL /* Gross tonnage of the vessel */,
  "net_tonnage" REAL /* Net tonnage of the vessel */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the vessel in meters */,
  "breadth" REAL /* Breadth of the vessel in meters */,
  "draft" REAL /* Draft of the vessel in meters */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the vessel was built */,
  "flag" TEXT /* Flag state of the vessel */,
  "call_sign" TEXT /* Call sign of the vessel */,
  "vessel_class" TEXT /* Class of the vessel (e.g., tanker, container, passenger) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessels_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner's company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the owner's company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the owner */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the owner's company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., GPS, magnetic sensors) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the data source in meters */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data source updates (e.g., every second) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the data version (e.g., 4.10) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the data version was released */,
  "updates" TEXT /* Description of updates and changes in the data version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "navigational_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each navigational status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the navigational status (e.g., V) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the navigational status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "position_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the position mode (e.g., A) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "magnetic_variation" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each magnetic variation entry */,
  "variation_value" REAL /* Value of the magnetic variation */,
  "variation_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the magnetic variation (E/W) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the magnetic variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., vessel operator, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session identifier for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessel_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position entry */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the position */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vessel */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vessel */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the vessel */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vessel at the position */,
  "course" REAL /* Course of the vessel at the position */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the position data (e.g., GPS, AIS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessel_positions_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessel_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., maintenance, event) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, critical) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the log event occurred */,
  "responsible_person" TEXT /* Person responsible for the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vessel_logs_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id")
)
